page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance type belonging to the ecs.g7 family, powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The processing power is driven by Intel Xeon 8369B processors. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance avoids hyperthreading, ensuring dedicated execution resources per virtual CPU.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7.32xlarge offers a high-density resource profile suitable for enterprise workloads requiring predictable, non-shared CPU performance. The dedicated core allocation eliminates noisy-neighbor issues, though the lack of bundled local storage requires factoring in the cost of external block storage.

This hardware configuration is suited for general-purpose enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and medium-sized database hosting where balanced compute and memory resources are required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and Intel Xeon 8369B processors. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it delivers 128 dedicated vCPUs across 128 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, operating at 2.7 GHz. The system is provisioned with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core memory ratio. It does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a 64 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This instance is designed for enterprise workloads requiring dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU resources and high network throughput. It is suited for large-scale web serving, application servers, containerized deployments, and database hosting.

tagline: A high-density, non-hyperthreaded general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high-throughput network connectivity for enterprise applications.

Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz
